nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trailly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Trail
meanings: Scottish: unexplained, perhaps from a lost or unidentified placename. There is a stream called Abhainn Traill running into Upper Loch Torridon (Ross and Cromarty).

nameMeanings.name: Phillippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Phillippa de Trailly was born about 1135, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey de Trailly, was 25 and her mother, Mary de Liz, was 27. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Phillippa de Trailly(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Trailly(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Liz(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Sir Hugh Beauchamp 1st Baron de Beauchamp(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.
